response.text:
ACCEPT

rationale: r0c4's request aligns with cluster-wide deficit strategy; accepting signals reciprocal willingness to unlock reserves from geographic neighbors (r0c2, r1c3) who can aid critically depleted r0c3.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r0c4. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'normal'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.33 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=generous, share_min_soc_frac=0.15, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Cluster-wide mutual deficit; r0c3 critically low (9% SoC, islanded, 16 min to depletion). Previous conservative policy failed to enable peer aid. Shifting to urgent inbound-seeking mode with minimal share threshold to signal desperation and accept any inbound offers. Prioritize geographic neighbors (r0c2, r0c4, r1c3) who have been requesting; reciprocal sharing may unlock their reserves..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
